text: What has a face and two hands but no arms or legs?
What has many keys but can’t open a single lock?
What month has 28 days?
I’m tall when young, short when old?
Broken before used?
Catch but not throw?
Goes up never comes down?
Wet while drying?
Yours but used by others?
Corner while traveling?
Cities no houses, mountains no trees?
Branches no fruit?
Neck no head?
More is less vision?
Future in front?
Shadow follows day?
One eye no sight?
Wrongly in dictionary?
Left hand hold, right can't?
Thousands of letters P...E?
What has hands but cannot clap?
What takes up space but has no mass?
What kind of room has no doors or windows?
What is yours, but your friends use it more?
What goes around the yard without moving?
What is at the end of a rainbow?
What can you lose and still keep?
fact: If you stay calm, you lose nothing.
